originalTitle: Dow Jones Futures: Tech Stocks Tumble As SpaceX Plunges; Amazon, Alphabet, Nvidia Sell Off
summary: Dow Jones Futures: The tech-heavy Nasdaq composite sold off Monday as SpaceX stock plunged. Amazon, Alphabet and Nvidia logged heavy losses.
content: Dow Jones Futures: The tech-heavy Nasdaq composite sold off Monday as SpaceX stock plunged. Amazon, Alphabet and Nvidia logged heavy losses.
chineseTitle: 道琼斯期货：随着 SpaceX 暴跌，科技股暴跌；亚马逊、Alphabet、Nvidia 遭抛售
chineseSummary: 道琼斯期货：周一，随着 SpaceX 股价暴跌，以科技股为主的纳斯达克综合指数遭到抛售。亚马逊、Alphabet 和英伟达均遭受重创。
chineseContent: 道琼斯期货：周一，随着 SpaceX 股价暴跌，以科技股为主的纳斯达克综合指数遭到抛售。亚马逊、Alphabet 和英伟达均遭受重创。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
